indications.text:
STRIBILD® is indicated as a complete regimen for the treatment of HIV-1 infection in
adults and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older weighing at least 35 kg who
have no antiretroviral treatment history or to replace the current antiretroviral regimen in
those who are virologically suppressed...
